title: 4 takeaways from the Revolution’s 3-1 loss to St. Louis City SC
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: The New England Revolution lost 3-1 to St. Louis City SC, making it their third defeat in four games this season.
St. Louis City SC's winning goals included a corner kick, marking a struggle with set-piece defense for the Revolution.
Forward Leo Campana exited with an injury in the 80th minute; the nature and severity of the injury are still unknown.

title: Don’t be fooled by this fake court notice scam in Mass., NH, authorities warn
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Massachusetts and New Hampshire authorities warn of fake court notices with errors like 'Massachuseetts' instead of 'Massachusetts'.
Scammers use QR codes in fake notices, urging recipients to pay fines for alleged traffic violations immediately.
Authorities advise deleting such messages and contacting courts directly through official channels for verification.

title: The trial of Kelsey Fitzsimmons begins this week. Here’s what to know.
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: The trial of North Andover officer Kelsey Fitzsimmons, accused of assault, begins March 23 in Essex Superior Court.
Fitzsimmons was shot during a confrontation at her home when served a restraining order sought by her fiancé.
Conflicting accounts surround the shooting incident, including allegations of Fitzsimmons pointing a gun at fellow officer Noonan.

title: She’s running Boston for patients ‘rebuilding their lives step by step’
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: Lina Sinisterra Mazariegos, 44, from Colombia, is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for Spaulding Rehabilitation Hospital.
Sinisterra Mazariegos began running to understand herself and sees marathons as a metaphor for life and recovery.
She aims to honor patients and professionals at Spaulding by running, highlighting recovery as a slow, human process.

title: Review & Setlist: ‘We are foreign imports, so we have paid tariffs.’
author: Marc Hirsh
bullets: The Hives performed at the House of Blues in Boston on March 20, 2026, with opening act The Chats.
Frontman Howlin’ Pelle Almqvist led the performance, showcasing new and old songs with the band's energetic style.
The setlist included songs like 'Enough Is Enough,' 'Hate To Say I Told You So,' and 'The Hives Forever Forever The Hives.'

title: Cancer couldn’t stop her. Now she’s running the Boston Marathon again.
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: Stephanie McHugh, 42, from Braintree, is running her third Boston Marathon with the New England Patriots Foundation.
Diagnosed with Stage 3 breast cancer in 2023, McHugh overcame chemotherapy and surgeries to resume her running journey.
McHugh runs in memory of her mentor, Susan Hurley, and her uncle, Kenny McHugh, while supporting cancer-related charities.

title: Markey presses Meta on facial recognition risks in smart glasses
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Sen. Ed Markey and others demand answers from Meta about potential facial recognition in smart glasses.
Lawmakers warn the technology could infringe on privacy, identifying protesters and chilling free expression.
Meta has until April 6 to respond regarding data protection measures for sensitive biometric data.

title: Debate in Quincy over funding for new firefighting gear after current gear tests positive for PFAS
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Quincy City Council delays vote on $2.65 million funding for PFAS-free firefighting gear.
Firefighters push for new gear after tests show harmful PFAS chemicals in current equipment.
Councilors express concerns over cost and durability; decision postponed for further review.

title: The battle over the aging Attleboro Zoo is getting wild
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Mayor Cathleen DeSimone proposes transforming Capron Park Zoo into a nature reserve to address high repair costs and declining attendance.
The zoo requires $57 million for capital improvements and costs $900,000 annually to operate, contributing to financial strain on Attleboro.
Zoo officials focus on animal care amid the proposal, while some criticize the plan as ill-conceived and a potential closure tactic.

title: What does it mean to have a partner?
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Watertown couple Abigail Brown and Colin Wong held a last-minute microwedding due to a blizzard disrupting their original plans.
The FX series 'Love Story: John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette' highlights 1990s communication norms, evoking nostalgia for pre-smartphone interactions.
Meredith Goldstein explores the evolving use of the term 'partner' in relationships and its implications in modern dating.
